prompt: Can you review this Docker Compose file for any security or configuration issues?

assertions.text: Identifies privileged mode as a security issue
Identifies Docker socket mount as a security issue
Identifies hardcoded secrets/passwords in environment variables
Identifies host network mode as a security issue
Identifies untagged/latest image as an issue
Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
Uses rule IDs (e.g. CV-C001, CV-C002) to reference specific violations
Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
Provides fix recommendations for identified issues
